tasks.title: Create responsive login page with validation
tasks.description: Create a sleek dark-themed login form. It must contain email validation (checking for '@' and standard domains) and password length verification (minimum 6 characters). Error text elements should have IDs '#emailError' and '#passwordError' respectively.

tasks.title: Create interactive Todo application
tasks.description: Create a Todo checklist page. Users can type tasks into input '#todoInput' and click button '#addBtn' to append items to list '#todoList'. Ensure adding an item clears the input box.
